extraction.article_title: 'BlueHammer' Windows Zero-Day Exploit Signals Microsoft Bug Disclosure Issues

ttps.description: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation: the article describes a Windows zero-day that allows a local user to achieve system takeover, consistent with abuse of a local privilege escalation flaw.

attack_chain: Local user executes a proof-of-concept exploit against a Windows zero-day
Exploit triggers privilege escalation and system-level takeover
